title: Watch live: Washington talks UFOs at UAP Disclosure Forum
description: The Hill brings you special coverage of the ultimate gathering of "who's who" in the UFO world. Lawmakers, military and agency leaders will gather in Washington, D.C,. to discuss cutting-edge insights on Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP)-related policy, transparency, security, congressional oversight, whistleblowers and balancing disclosure for the American people with national security. Hear from Senate...

title: 'Nonhuman Biological Specimens': Bipartisan UFO Forum Set To Expose Pentagon's Secret Contractor Loophole
description: A forum in Washington will address claims of Pentagon secrecy regarding UFOs, featuring lawmakers and experts, and the controversial 'nonhuman biological specimens' allegation.

title: UFO Movie Disclosure Day Branded 'Scientology in Disguise' Over Striking Links to Church Teachings
description: The film 'Disclosure Day' is drawing comparisons to Scientology, with critics noting similarities in themes of spiritual awakening and hidden memories, despite no confirmed connection.

title: Aliens At FIFA World Cup 2026? Psychic Makes Viral Claim Of UFO Invasion During Brazil Vs Scotland Match
description: A Brazilian psychic’s bizarre prediction of an alien invasion during the FIFA World Cup 2026 match between Brazil and Scotland in Miami has gone viral online. Vo Bahiana, who has over 23 million followers, claims recurring dreams showed UFOs abducting players and fans from Hard Rock Stadium. Despite widespread attention on social media, there is no evidence... The post Aliens At FIFA World Cup 2026?
